reason: test_claude_md_dep_strategy_updated has a bug - it finds the wrong Gotchas occurrence (position 6623 in a cross-reference like 'see Gotchas)' instead of the actual ## Gotchas section at position 17306). The test needs to use src.find('## Gotchas') instead of src.find('Gotchas'). This is a test bug that cannot be fixed by modifying instruction.md
